allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'node','npm','npx','python','py','pip','git','docker'\) { $cmd = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { try { $v = & $c --version 2>$null } catch { $v = '\(version check failed\)' }; "{0,-8} {1}" -f $c, \($v -join ' '\) } else { "{0,-8} NOT FOUND" -f $c } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "STATUS $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'English Speaking Society' -and $r.Content -match 'ESS'\) { 'CONTENT_OK: トップ雛形がレンダリングされました' } else { 'CONTENT_CHECK: マーカー不一致' } } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(& 'C:\\ess_website\\frontend\\node_modules\\.bin\\tsc.cmd' --noEmit -p 'C:\\ess_website\\frontend\\tsconfig.json' 2>&1; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { 'TSC: OK \(no type errors\)' } else { "TSC: exit $LASTEXITCODE" })

PowerShell(backend\\venv\\Scripts\\python.exe -c "import sys; sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding='utf-8'\); sys.path.insert\(0,'backend'\); from app import create_app; from app.extensions import SessionLocal as s; from app.models import ParticipationRequest, ContactInquiry; create_app\(\); n1=s.query\(ParticipationRequest\).filter_by\(email='accept@example.com'\).delete\(\); n2=s.query\(ContactInquiry\).filter_by\(email='accept@example.com'\).delete\(\); s.commit\(\); print\('cleaned_participation', n1, 'cleaned_contact', n2\)"; Remove-Item 'C:\\ess_website\\_tmp_accept.ps1' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; foreach \($port in 3000,5000\){ $c=Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($c\){$c.OwningProcess|Select-Object -Unique|ForEach-Object{try{Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; "stopped $port"}catch{}}}})

PowerShell(Get-Process node,next-server -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,StartTime,@{n='Cmd';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}} | Format-List)
